query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_compute.compute_apps
            (id, operator_id, name, repository_url,
             repository_owner, repository_name,
             default_branch, framework,
             deployment_target, connection_id,
             root_directory, build_command,
             install_command, output_directory,
             node_version, status,
             production_deployment_id, d1_bindings,
             created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES
            (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
             ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
